name: Tengra Web
description: Web search, page reading, and JSON fetch tools packaged as an external MCP plugin.
author: Tengra Studio

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web for a query.

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Fetch text from an HTTP or HTTPS page.

tools.name: fetch_json
tools.description: Fetch and parse JSON from an HTTP or HTTPS endpoint.
